title: pinus pinaster subsp. atlantica
intro: Pinus pinaster subsp. atlantica, also known as maritime pine, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to the Mediterranean region. The resin of this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pinus pinaster subsp. atlantica include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress, which can contribute to the development of chronic diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, resin extracts, and teas, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
